posts.author: baruchm (Baruch Moroz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I am looking to have a capability that will allow me to pin the top group (similar to freeze pane in excel) so when a user scrolls down the Gantt, the items in the pinned group will be visible regardless to how much user scrolls down.

Thank you
Baruch
